page: Vultr vc2-1c-1gb is an entry-level virtual machine belonging to the Cloud Compute family. It features a single shared vCPU based on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Broadwell processor running at 2.0 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 1.0 GB of system memory and a local 25 GB NVMe SSD for storage. No dedicated graphics processing units are included.

Benchmark results place this server in the lower performance tier. The stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests both yield a score of 691.39, reflecting its shared-core allocation. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block bandwidth of 67.6 GB/sec, which drops to 7.8 GB/sec for large blocks, alongside a write bandwidth of 5.19 GB/sec. Passmark CPU and memory scores are 1061.65 and 683.72 respectively, indicating constrained computational capacity.

Due to the shared CPU allocation and limited memory capacity, this instance is not designed for resource-intensive applications. It is best suited for lightweight utility tasks, low-traffic static web serving, software development testing, or running small background scripts. The inclusion of a local 25 GB NVMe SSD provides fast storage access relative to the compute constraints, making it a cost-efficient option for basic hosting needs that do not require sustained high CPU performance.
description: The Vultr vc2-1c-1gb is an entry-level virtual server within the Cloud Compute family, configured with 1 shared vCPU, 1.0 GB of RAM, and 25 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Powered by an Intel Broadwell processor running at 2.0 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, this instance is designed for basic, low-resource workloads. Benchmark data indicates constrained performance, with stress-ng and Passmark CPU scores falling into the bottom 10% tier. Memory bandwidth is limited, reaching 7.8 GB/sec for large block reads and 5.19 GB/sec for writes. Given its shared CPU allocation and minimal memory footprint, this server is highly cost-efficient for lightweight utility tasks, development environments, and low-traffic static web serving.
og_description: Vultr vc2-1c-1gb is an entry-level Cloud Compute server featuring 1 shared Intel vCPU, 1.0 GB of RAM, and 25 GB of NVMe SSD storage, designed for lightweight utility workloads and basic web serving.

tagline: A budget-friendly, entry-level virtual server with shared compute resources and local NVMe storage for lightweight utility workloads.
